utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 fields. Now check each for being fully specified with all details as requested in the format: 
- health_coverage: The format requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Plan provides physical_health plan with cost, mental_health plan with cost, and a combined cost. This is fully specified. 
- property_coverage: The format requires 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Plan includes home_content_insurance with cost and adds technology_protection and home_office_protection with costs, plus total cost. It does include home/contents with costs, so it is sufficiently specified. 
- travel_coverage: The format requires 'travel insurance with costs'. Plan includes basic_travel_insurance and adventure_travel_coverage with costs and total. Fully specified. 
- additional_services: The format requires 'any enhancement services with costs'. The plan provides a descriptive note but no specific services with their costs under this field; costs are embedded under property/travel but additional_services itself lacks itemized services with costs. Not fully specified. 
- total_budget: Requires 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Plan provides monthly and annual totals, so fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9). LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) maps to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 4). LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home content insurance) maps to property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9). Technology Protection maps to property_enhancement_services.Technology Protection (rating 8). Home Office Protection maps to property_enhancement_services.Home Office Protection (rating 7). SecureLife Basic Plan (basic travel insurance) maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.SecureLife Basic Plan (rating 4). Adventure Travel Coverage maps to travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10).
